title: After the Yasuda Kinen: Heating Up

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a mile-long race and, appropriate for its G1
status, demands total concentration from start to
finish. With tension at an all-time high, Sweep
Tosho clings to her hopes of victory...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! Did you see that final stretch?! She just refused to back down!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: I don't know how she pulled that off, but that performance had me pinching myself something fierce! Sweep Tosho, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Sweeeeep! Do your best in the Takarazuka Kinen!
No, wait... Go out and win that thing! We'll be
cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: People on Their Phones
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! That Yasuda Kinen was absolutely incrrrredible!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh, right... It should be over by now...

text_block_list.name: People on Their Phones
text_block_list.text: OMG, that was so lit! And did you see what Sweep Tosho did at the end?!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I don't even need to hear the details to know
what happened. I'm sure that you ran a great race
and captured everyone's hearts, Sweep.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And next, you're going to head to the Takarazuka
Kinen, ready to cast your magic and realize that
dream of yours to change the world.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Because that's who you are.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You always manage to be the coolest. That's
probably why...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I've always dreamed of being your rival.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh! ...Hello?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Yes, that's fine. I'll be back in time! Yes...
Yes. I'm sorry for worrying you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then. I'm looking forward to running with
you, Kris S.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Who will be the protagonist of this story? The
witch who has finally completed her incantation...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Or the newly awoken hero? We'll find out at the
Takarazuka Kinen.
